name: How Much Does Correctness Cost? Budgeted Placement of Strong Correctors in a Weak Multi-Agent Swarm
content: A cheap swarm of unreliable agents can be steered to a correct consensus by a few strong, expensive "oracle" correctors. We ask how much one must spend, and where to place the oracles. We model the swarm as a consensus on a graph in which each oracle pins one node toward the truth at a cost-coupled, concave strength, and measure quality by the coherence H(R)=tr M(R)^{-1}. Our first result is that H stays submodular (each added oracle helps less than the last) even when the oracles differ in stre
summary: 通过少量强且昂贵的‘占卜’正确器，可以引导一组不可靠的廉价代理达成正确的共识。我们探讨了需要花费多少以及如何放置这些正确器。
key_insights: H保持亚模性（每个新增的正确器帮助程度小于上一个），即使正确器在强度上有差异；
成本效益贪婪算法能在任何预算下接近最优位置，误差不超过1/e。
逆向预算可以得到保证达到给定精度的最低花费边界B*(eps)。
xihe_relevance: 对曦和系统的潜在价值在于其在多代理系统中的应用，特别是在处理复杂任务时提高效率和准确性。
